name: @taptime/backend-bootstrap
description: C3B operator-only first Organization and Administrator bootstrap capability.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly && esbuild src/index.ts src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --external:@taptime/backend-identity --external:pg --sourcemap --outdir=dist && chmod 755 dist/main.js
